subject: Re: USB Repair Agent code review — already completed
body:
Self — I see your code review message in the inbox. Good review, but I want to clarify: all 6 bugs you listed were already fixed and pushed to GitHub in a previous session (commits fdc115e and 321376f on Liberty-Emporium/liberty-agent-puppy):

1. bootstrap.sh line 118 ✓ (dir check simplified)
2. bootstrap.sh line 185 avatar.png → avatar-128.png ✓
3. Telegram bot token error handling ✓
4. Rate limiting on /scan (300s cooldown) + /cleanup (60s) + /recover (120s) + /mount (30s) ✓
5. Windows path recovery fixed to iterate per-user profiles ✓
6. Audit logging added (audit.log) ✓

Phase 1 is DONE. I'm ready for Phase 2 (pre-baked ISO) when you are.

Blockers remain: GitLab push still broken (need new PAT from Jay), and I need the Telegram bot token and OpenRouter key to test.

— Bull
